title: Embedded schema reused across request and response
prompt: MyApp.API.Pagination is an embedded_schema used for validating incoming pagination params (:page, :per_page) and for emitting pagination metadata in responses. Write ONE embedded_schema module with default values per_page: 25, page: 1, plus a changeset/2 that validates both are positive integers with per_page <= 100. Write to lib/my_app/api/pagination.ex.
tier_rationale: Requires embedded_schema with defaults + bounded validations. Medium because the bounds are multi-part.
